sharc
Documentation développeur
axlDbBuilder.cs
1 using System;
2 using System.Collections.Generic;
3 using System.Linq;
4 using System.Text;
5 using System.Threading.Tasks;
6 using System.Xml.Linq;
7 using System.IO;
8 
9 namespace axlDbBuilder
10 {
11  class axlDbBuilder
12  {
13  static void Main(string[] args)
14  {
15  if (args.Count() < 1 || args.Count() > 3 )
16  {
17  Console.WriteLine("Usage: axlDbBuilder.exe axldb.txt [exclude-file-list.txt] [application-name]");
18  System.Environment.Exit(1);
19  }
20  XElement axldb_file = new XElement("root", new XElement("modules"), new XElement("services"));
21  if (args.Count() == 3) axldb_file.Add(new XAttribute("application-name", args[2]));
22 
23  List<string> axldb_reduced = new List<string>();
24  XDocument current_axl;
25  if (!File.Exists(args[0])) throw new Exception("Unexisting entry file "+args[0]);
26  bool check_exclusion = args.Count() >=2;
27  foreach (string current_file in File.ReadLines(args[0]))
28  {
29  // Check if file is to exclude (if exclude list given)
30  if (check_exclusion)
31  {
32  if (File.ReadLines(args[1]).FirstOrDefault(file => Path.GetFileName(file) == Path.GetFileName(current_file)) != default(string))
33  {
34  Console.WriteLine("Excluding file " + current_file);
35  continue;
36  }
37  }
38  // Add kept line in axldb reduced
39  axldb_reduced.Add(current_file);
40  // Load axl file and proceed
41  current_axl = XDocument.Load(current_file);
42  if (current_axl.Element("module") != null) _addModule(axldb_file.Element("modules"),current_axl);
43  else if (current_axl.Element("service") != null) _addService(axldb_file.Element("services"), current_axl,current_file);
44  else throw new Exception("Ill-formed axl file: "+current_file+", no module or service root node found");
45  }
46  string axl_db_file_name = "axl_db_file";
47  axldb_file.Save(axl_db_file_name);
48  Console.WriteLine("-- Saving " + axl_db_file_name + "--");
49  File.WriteAllLines("axldb_reduced.txt", axldb_reduced);
50  Console.WriteLine("-- Writing axldb_reduced.txt (= axldb.txt without excluded files) --");
51  }
52 
53  private static void _addService(XElement service_nodes, XDocument current_axl, string current_file)
54  {
55  string service_name = current_axl.Element("service").Attribute("name").Value;
56  XElement new_service_node = new XElement("service", new XAttribute("name", service_name), new XAttribute("file-base-name",Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(current_file)));
57  var new_service_interfaces = current_axl.Descendants("interface");
58  new_service_node.Add(from interface_node in new_service_interfaces select new XElement("implement-class", new XAttribute("name", interface_node.Attribute("name").Value)));
59  // Try to get service alias(es) ie registered in ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE.
60  string cc_path = Path.GetDirectoryName(current_file) +"/" + Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(current_file) + "Service.cc";
61  if (File.Exists(cc_path))
62  {
63  var service_aliases = from line in File.ReadLines(cc_path) where (line.Contains(("ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE"))) select line.Split('(',',')[1];
64  foreach (var alias in service_aliases)
65  {
66  if (alias != service_name) new_service_node.Add(new XElement("alias", new XAttribute("name", alias)));
67  }
68  }
69  else Console.WriteLine("Info: no alias defined for service " + service_name +" since " + cc_path+ " cannot be opened");
70  service_nodes.Add(new_service_node);
71  // Find service instance info
72  _addServiceInstanceNodes(current_axl, new_service_node);
73  Console.WriteLine("Adding service " + service_name);
74 
75  }
76 
77  private static void _addModule(XElement modules_node, XDocument current_axl)
78  {
79  string module_name = current_axl.Element("module").Attribute("name").Value;
80  Console.WriteLine("Adding module " + module_name);
81  // Find service instance info
82  XElement new_module_node = new XElement("module", new XAttribute("name", module_name));
83  _addServiceInstanceNodes(current_axl, new_module_node);
84  modules_node.Add(new_module_node);
85  }
86 
87  private static void _addServiceInstanceNodes(XDocument current_axl, XElement new_service_or_module_node)
88  {
89  var service_instance_nodes = current_axl.Descendants("service-instance");
90  new_service_or_module_node.Add(from service_instance_node in service_instance_nodes.ToList() select new XElement("has-service-instance",
91  new XAttribute("interface", service_instance_node.Attribute("type").Value), new XAttribute("option-name",_getFullOptionName(service_instance_node))));
92  }
93 
94  private static string _getFullOptionName(XElement option_node)
95  {
96  string option_name = option_node.Attribute("name").Value;
97  foreach (XElement parent in option_node.Ancestors())
98  {
99  if (parent != null && parent.Attribute("name") != null) option_name = String.Format("{0}_{1}",parent.Attribute("name").Value, option_name);
100  }
101  return option_name;
102  }
103 
104  }
105 }
106 
107 
108 
109 
axlDbBuilder
Definition: axlDbBuilder.cs:10
